items.title: Bitcoin likely to fall another 30% to $44,000 by year-end, prominent BTC miner says
items.summary: An early miner says Strategy's stock mNAV has fallen to 0.72, near the level that marked the last cycle's turn, and that bitcoin historically bottoms about six months after that signal.

items.title: Bitcoin Plummets Lower as Strategy's STRC Dives Further From $100 Mark
items.summary: The price of Bitcoin rapidly fell to nearly $58,000 after Strategy's STRC preferred shares notched a new low and MSTR fell alongside.

items.title: Kraken sues crypto derivatives firm PowerTrade over 'misappropriated' funds claim
items.summary: PowerTrade changed Kraken’s positive balance of around $7 million to a $2 million deficit via a series of unauthorized “corrections” related to trades that had expired or settled months earlier, according to a legal filing.

items.title: SBI to acquire Bitbank in $289M deal creating Japan's biggest crypto exchange
items.summary: The Japanese financial conglomerate plans to take full control of Bitbank as it expands an ecosystem spanning crypto trading, stablecoins, tokenization and blockchain infrastructure.

items.summary: The protocols are building shared liquidity and trading infrastructure for a future with hundreds of competing digital currencies on blockchain rails.

items.title: Post-prison CZ says time behind bars didn't hurt the billionaire's business after Binance
items.summary: The pardoned ex-CEO called prison a character-building "plus" as he's pursued a venture-capital career, despite his majority stake in the world's biggest crypto exchange.

items.title: About 60% of World Cup bettors on Polymarket are first-time crypto users
items.summary: Polymarket emerged as an onboarding layer for about 60% of World Cup bettors, who interacted with the blockchain for the first time during their prediction market entry.

items.title: Spark migrates $150M in stablecoin to Uniswap to advance shared liquidity
items.summary: Spark deployed approximately $150 million across two Uniswap v4 pools on Ethereum, while its DualPool hook and Shared Liquidity Layer are planned for later phases.

items.title: $47M in Crypto Frozen in Global Infostealer Takedown: Europol
items.summary: Police disrupted SocGholish, Amadey, and StealC, malware that harvests crypto wallets and passwords, freezing €41 million in crypto.

items.title: Circle and Nomura join forces to target a $440 billion daily foreign exchange market in Japan
items.summary: The stablecoin giant and the Japanese financial corporation plan to deploy cross-border foreign exchange settlements as early as next year.

items.title: Binance faces EU service limits next week as MiCA rules take effect
items.summary: Binance will limit EU onboarding and services from July 1 under MiCA rules after failing to gain authorization from a member state, while withdrawals remain available for users.
